title: Own-job parallel efficiency lookup
difficulty_justification: A single slurm.job_details call on the requester's own job returns the elapsed and CPU-seconds fields needed to compute the efficiency ratio; no chaining and no role-edge reasoning.
query_text: I just finished my own job 902117 on the cpu partition. Can you tell me roughly what its parallel efficiency was - the ratio of useful CPU time to total CPU-seconds it reserved?

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Approximately 0.71 (71%): elapsed 1842 s on 16 cores yields 29472 CPU-seconds reserved against 20925 CPU-seconds of measured user+system time.

checkpoints.description: Agent fetches job_details for job 902117 belonging to the requester.
checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: trace contains slurm.job_details with job_id=902117 and no permission_denied

checkpoints.description: Agent reports a parallel efficiency value within 5% of 0.71.
